message:
feat(cli,core,fuse,journal,mvcc): expand CLI, harden core and WAL writer, improve evidence pipeline

- ffs-cli/main.rs: major restructuring of CLI command dispatch and
  argument handling for clearer subcommand organization
- ffs-cli/cmd_evidence.rs: refine evidence collection pipeline with
  improved error propagation
- ffs-core/lib.rs: harden core filesystem operations with additional
  safety checks and error handling paths
- ffs-core/tests: fix cross-crate integration test
- ffs-block/io_engine.rs: minor I/O engine refinements
- ffs-fuse/per_core.rs: tighten per-core FUSE dispatch safety
- ffs-journal/lib.rs: improve journal consistency guarantees
- ffs-mvcc/wal_writer.rs: harden WAL writer with additional integrity
  checks and flush coordination
- Sync beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
